narration_text: If you're tired of unanswered prayers, listen to this. Sometimes silence isn't absence—it's an invitation to look inward. Start by asking God to search your heart, using Psalm 139 as your guide, and confess any mixed motives. Name any bitterness, and pray a simple release: "Lord, help me forgive." Review how you're stewarding your time, money, and words—Luke 16 reminds us that small faithfulness matters. If you notice a pattern, respond with humble repair: commit to regular prayer and small, obedient steps. God hears honest hearts. Try the 7-day Prayer Audit to begin practical change and find hope.
